cards.interactive: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-[#E5E2DC] shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300

flashcard.surface: absolute w-full h-full bg-white rounded-3xl border border-[#E5E2DC] shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(27,67,50,0.08)] backface-hidden flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-8

chips.default: px-4 py-2 rounded-full border border-[#E5E2DC] bg-[#F9F8F6] text-[#525B56] text-sm font-medium transition-colors
chips.active: px-4 py-2 rounded-full border border-[#1B4332] bg-[#1B4332] text-[#FFFFFF] text-sm font-medium transition-colors

search_input.container: flex items-center w-full bg-white rounded-2xl border border-[#E5E2DC] px-4 py-3 shadow-sm focus-within:border-[#1B4332] focus-within:ring-2 focus-within:ring-[#1B4332]/20 transition-all
search_input.input: flex-1 bg-transparent text-[#1A1D1A] placeholder:text-[#525B56] outline-none ml-3

buttons.primary: bg-[#1B4332] text-white rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-[#2D6A4F] transition-colors focus:ring-4 focus:ring-[#1B4332]/30 active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F9F8F6] text-[#1B4332] rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium border border-[#E5E2DC] hover:bg-[#E5E2DC] transition-colors

icons.style: stroke-2, rounded edges, size 24 for primary actions, size 20 for inline

layout_patterns.splash: h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-[#1B4332] relative overflow-hidden
layout_patterns.dashboard: mobile-first container max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#F9F8F6] pb-24
layout_patterns.word_of_the_day: relative w-full rounded-3xl overflow-hidden min-h-[240px] flex flex-col justify-end p-6
layout_patterns.term_list_item: flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-white rounded-2xl border border-[#E5E2DC] active:bg-[#F4F3F0]

splash_art.description: Splash Screen background. Deep green abstract heritage pattern.
splash_art.usage: Use as full cover background on the splash screen with a dark overlay (bg-black/30) if needed for logo contrast.

math_art.usage: Use as a decorative element in the empty state or category headers.

daily_word_bg.usage: Use as the background image (absolute inset, object-cover) for the 'Word of the Day' hero card. Overlay with gradient (bg-gradient-to-t from-black/60 to-transparent) to ensure text contrast.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a mobile-first UI for React/Tailwind. Ensure max-w-md mx-auto on desktop to maintain mobile app proportions.
Use standard Tailwind classes where possible. For the 3D flip card, use perspective and backface-visibility utilities in custom CSS if needed, or framer-motion.
Bilingual Typography: Use Noto Sans Kannada for Kannada text, but ensure line-height is generous (leading-loose) because Kannada script has high vertical ascenders and descenders.
Every interactive element (buttons, chips, list items) MUST have data-testid matching its role.
In the term list, use Lucide icons for the 'Listen' and 'Bookmark' actions.
Do NOT use raw Shadcn for the main marketing/hero segments, build custom raw HTML+Tailwind structures for the Word of the Day card to implement the generated background image perfectly.
